description: Normalize OTel Demo checkout 'order placed' logs into business.* fields (dest pipeline for orders transform). Uses Painless because OTel attributes use dotted keys (app.order.id) inside the attributes object.

script.source: if (ctx.business == null) { ctx.business = new HashMap(); } if (ctx.business.order == null) { ctx.business.order = new HashMap(); } if (ctx.business.shipping == null) { ctx.business.shipping = new HashMap(); } ctx.business.order.id = ctx.attributes['app.order.id']; if (ctx.attributes.containsKey('app.order.amount')) { ctx.business.order.amount = ctx.attributes['app.order.amount']; } if (ctx.attributes.containsKey('app.order.items.count')) { ctx.business.order.items_count = ctx.attributes['app.order.items.count']; } if (ctx.attributes.containsKey('app.shipping.amount')) { ctx.business.shipping.amount = ctx.attributes['app.shipping.amount']; } if (ctx.attributes.containsKey('app.shipping.tracking.id')) { ctx.business.shipping.tracking_id = ctx.attributes['app.shipping.tracking.id']; } ctx.business.order.status = 'completed'; if (ctx['@timestamp'] != null) { ctx.business.order.placed_at = ctx['@timestamp']; }
